prompt: Generate a city tourism map infographic. Use Image 1 to mark the landmark, Image 2 to indicate local food spots, and Image 3 to highlight walking routes.
prompt_refined: Generate a visual city tourism map infographic. This infographic should clearly mark a central or prominent landmark using an icon styled after the archway in Image 1. Include multiple icons similar to the grilled steak on a plate in Image 2, scattered across the map to indicate various local food spots. Designate specific walking routes on the map, highlighted by repeated pedestrian icons resembling the figure on a crosswalk in Image 3, placed along these paths.
objects: Central or prominent landmark icon styled after the archway in Image 1
Multiple food spot icons scattered across the map, similar to the grilled steak on a plate in Image 2
Specific walking routes on the map
Repeated pedestrian icons placed along walking routes, resembling the figure on a crosswalk in Image 3
